prompt:
Apply an ethereal, cinematic lighting effect while fully preserving the original photo. Change only lighting, glow, and color mood. Add soft, diffused sunlight with gentle highlights on cheekbones, nose bridge, lips, and hair. Maintain clear contrast between bright light and soft shadows. Introduce subtle lens bloom, light haze, and a faint glow around the face and shoulders. Render skin luminous with warm peachy tones. Slightly reduce saturation and add mild film grain. Keep the background unchanged, allowing natural light flares and soft bokeh. The result should feel soft, dreamy, sunlit, and cinematic.

Hard rule:
Do not alter facial features, structure, textures, or background—only lighting and color mood.

prompt:
A high-end, ultra-realistic product photography scene featuring @img1 as the hero.

Concept

Indulgent, rich, chocolate-forward protein bar visual

Focus on taste, texture, and premium feel

Background

Smooth, matte surface

No gradients, no patterns

Protein bar placed slightly angled, partially resting on its own broken pieces

Wrapper clearly visible, readable, and undistorted

Bar feels grounded yet dynamic

Thick, glossy chocolate / sauce / flavor drizzle pouring from above onto the bar

Realistic flow with natural thickness and shine

Broken bar chunks stacked beside the bar showing texture inside

Small crumbs or nut bits scattered subtly for realism

Lighting

Soft studio lighting with warm highlights

Gentle shadows beneath the bar and chunks

Emphasis on gloss, richness, and depth

No harsh reflections on packaging

Camera & Composition

Eye-level or slightly low angle

Tight framing with negative space above

Shallow depth of field for premium focus

Ultra-sharp details on product and textures

Product Rules

Keep exact bar shape, wrapper design, branding, and proportions

No redesign, no logo edits

No text overlays, no watermarks

Style Keywords

Premium protein bar photography, indulgent food ad, chocolate pour effect, texture-focused commercial shot, ultra-realistic, minimalist luxury FMCG

prompt:
Create a high-contrast monochrome cinematic photograph with a timeless fine-art editorial aesthetic. In the foreground, a strong black horse sits low on a minimalist metal stool, positioned centrally. The horse is dressed in dark, oversized, layered human clothing -including a structured coat, wide-leg trousers, and heavy leather boots. The horse's posture is grounded and relaxed: legs spread forward, feet firmly planted on uneven outdoor terrain. One front hoof rests loosely between the knees, holding thin leather reins. The shoulders are slightly slouched, head gently tilted downward, conveying a calm, introspective presence. In the background, a single human figure stands a short distance behind the seated horse, aligned almost protectively and partially overlapping the horse's silhouette.The person wears dark, minimalist tailored clothing with clean lines and a matte finish, blending naturally into the scene. The person is wearing black sunglasses with a subtle, understated design, adding anonymity and composure. The facial features must match the provided face image naturally, with realistic proportions, lighting, and expression consistent with the environment. The face should feel seamlessly integrated, not stylized or exaggerated.

The setting is an open natural landscape with rough ground, scattered stones, and wild grass. The sky is bright and slightly overexposed, creating strong negative space and dramatic contrast.

Lighting is high contrast with deep blacks, soft highlights, matte textures, and subtle film grain. The overall look resembles medium-format film photography-cinematic, moody, avant-garde luxury fashion editorial.
Maintain sharp detail, balanced composition, 
and a natural depth of field. The image should feel minimal, powerful, and emotionally quiet.
Output in high quality (1080p or higher) with no loss of texture or detail.

prompt:
Enhance the existing photo only keep the original framing, angle, composition, and facial proportions exactly the same. Do not crop, zoom, or convert to a close-up.Improve overall image clarity and sharpness naturally, with special attention to eye detail while keeping the full face and original framing intact.

Refine focus slightly for better definition without making it overly sharp.

Apply soft, natural cinematic lighting correction, preserving realistic shadows and depth already present in the image.

Enhance natural skin texture with visible pores and fine details – no beauty smoothing, no skin softening.

Remove digital noise and compression artifacts while retaining organic texture.

Improve dynamic range and contrast subtly, with muted highlights and rich mid-tones.

Maintain accurate, organic skin tones with realistic color balance.

Add very subtle cinematic film grain for a professional movie-still look.

Background should remain exactly as it is, only slightly cleaner if noisy no artificial blur added.

Preserve all facial features, expressions, hair strands, and natural imperfections.

Photorealistic result, professional camera look, high-quality enhancement only – no stylization.

NEGATIVE PROMPT (CRITICAL)

close-up, zoomed-in, cropped face, changed framing, face alteration, reshaped features, beauty filter, oversmoothed skin, plastic skin, waxy texture, Al face, cartoon, anime, CGI, illustration, painting, artificial blur, fake bokeh, harsh lighting, flat lighting, over-sharpening, halos, HDR look, distorted eyes, asymmetry, extra details, digital artifacts, smartphone filter look.

RECOMMENDED SETTINGS (IMPORTANT)

Image-to-Image Strength / Denoise: 0.15-0.30

CFG/Guidance: 5-7

Steps: 25-35

Face Restoration: OFF

Upscale: After final result only (2x max)

Seed: Fixed (for consistency)

prompt: Gritty black-and-white street portrait with heavy film grain, high contrast, and raw photocopy/zine texture. Scene: a dense urban wall layered with torn posters, wheatpaste residue, ripped typography, sticker fragments, grime, scratches, and chaotic overlapping paper textures. Large readable word fragments like “NIGHT” appear multiple times among partially torn letters. Background completely filled, no empty space, no modern minimal look. SUBJECT (center-left): Young man, early 20s, framed waist-up. Body angled right, mostly turned away from camera, head rotated back over left shoulder giving a sharp, controlled side-eye toward lens. Expression calm, slightly intense, neutral lips. Defined but natural jawline. Realistic skin texture with visible pores, subtle cheekbone shadow. No smoothing, no beautification. HAIR: Medium-length textured hair, slightly messy, dark tone (deep grey in B). Natural volume, imperfect strands near forehead. Matte finish, not styled. OUTFIT: Black turtleneck or minimal crewneck sweater, matte fabric, no logos, no accessories. Subtle folds visible, blending into darker tones. NEON-YELLOW OVERLAY (only color in image): Bold paint-marker scribbles across entire frame. Top: long sweeping tag line. Center: rough rectangular box highlighting poster area with small handwritten “intro”-like scribble inside. Left: thick block strokes and diagonal hatch lines over text. Right: tall vertical strokes, arrows, loops, dense scribble cluster in top-right. Opaque, streaky, imperfect marker texture. COMPOSITION: Eye-level, 35–50mm lens look, medium close portrait. Subject sharp, background slightly softened but readable. No motion blur. Strong grain, subtle vignette, slight halation in highlights. Raw underground editorial aesthetic. STRICT: No extra colors, no extra people, no props, no studio look, no clean background.

prompt: Use the attached face/subject reference as absolute identity ground truth. Preserve the exact facial structure, proportions, skin tone, bone structure, jawline, nose shape, lip shape, eye shape, and natural asymmetry of the referenced person. Do not beautify, stylize, enhance, or modify the face in any way. Maintain real skin texture, pores, and natural imperfections exactly as in the reference. Identity accuracy is critical and must remain consistent with the reference without reinterpretation. Create a raw street portrait captured in bright natural daylight using long-exposure photography. Frame vertically in a 4:5 ratio as a medium close-up from chest upward with slight camera proximity but not a tight crop. The subject stands still in the center of a fast-moving urban crowd, body steady and eyes looking directly into the camera, with hair subtly affected by ambient air movement. Simulate a realistic shutter speed around 1/4 to 1/8 second so the subject remains relatively stable while surrounding pedestrians move quickly, producing strong horizontal motion streaks. Motion blur must appear physically captured in-camera: layered, uneven, and naturally overlapping across the frame, partially passing over the subject and with foreground motion creating translucent streaks in front of the lens. Avoid radial blur, gaussian blur, artificial depth blur, or any digital motion simulation blur must feel optically real from long exposure. Keep the eyes relatively sharper than the rest of the frame but not hyper-sharp, allowing slight global softness from the long exposure and avoiding any artificial clarity or over-sharpening. Lighting should be bright natural daylight with soft highlights on the hair, gentle highlight bloom, and natural contrast. Preserve fine film grain, subtle chromatic noise in shadow areas, and slight exposure imperfections for realism. Use natural daylight color tones with warm but realistic skin tones and a neutral urban background.

Enhance natural skin texture with visible pores and fine details — no beauty smoothing, no skin softening.

Remove digital noise and compression artifacts while retaining organic texture.

Improve dynamic range and contrast subtly, with muted highlights and rich mid-tones.

Maintain accurate, organic skin tones with realistic color balance.

Add very subtle cinematic film grain for a professional movie-still look.Background should remain exactly as it is, only slightly cleaner if noisy - no artificial blur added.

Preserve all facial features, expressions, hair strands, and natural imperfections.

Photorealistic result, professional camera look, high-quality enhancement only - no stylization.

close-up, zoomed-in, cropped face, changed framing, face alteration, reshaped features, beauty filter, oversmoothed skin, plastic skin, waxy texture, Al face, cartoon, anime, CGI, illustration, painting, artificial blur, fake bokeh, harsh lighting, flat lighting, over-sharpening, halos, HDR look, distorted eyes, asymmetry, extra details, digital artifacts, smartphone filter look.

CFG / Guidance: 5-7
